# Copilot Instructions — TaskFlow (justdo-vue)

> Auto-generated by `workflow-manager.prompt.md` (`action=create`) on 2026-03-01.
> Source of truth: [`artifacts/repo_facts.json`](../artifacts/repo_facts.json)

---

## Repository Overview

**TaskFlow** is a single-package Vue 3 activity & task management application.

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| Package Manager | pnpm (>= 8.6.12) |
| Build Tool | Vite 5 |
| Framework | Vue 3.4, Pinia 2.1, Vue Router 4.5 |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS 4.1 (via `@tailwindcss/vite`) |
| Language | TypeScript (mixed — some legacy JS) |
| CI/CD | **Not yet configured** |
| Test Runner | **Not yet installed** |

---

## Golden Commands (verified)

These commands come directly from `package.json` scripts:

```bash
pnpm install          # Install dependencies
pnpm dev              # Start Vite dev server (http://localhost:5173)
pnpm build            # Production build (vite build → dist/)
pnpm preview          # Preview production build locally
```

> **No test, lint, or format commands exist yet.** Do not reference `pnpm test`, `pnpm lint`, or similar — they will fail. See `docs/WORKFLOW_AUDIT_REPORT.md` for remediation.

Evidence: `package.json` → `scripts` block.

---

## Project Architecture

```
src/
├── main.ts                  # Entry: Vue 3 + Pinia + Router + Chart.js
├── App.vue                  # Root component (<router-view>)
├── core/                    # Shared layer
│   ├── components/          # Base UI: BaseCard, BaseInput, BaseCheckbox, …
│   │   └── charts/          # Chart.js wrappers
│   ├── icons/               # Icon components
│   ├── composables/         # Shared composables
│   ├── utils/               # Utility functions
│   └── …                    # accessibility, error-boundaries, persistence, etc.
├── modules/                 # Feature modules (self-contained)
│   ├── activities/          # Activity CRUD + store + types
│   ├── auth/                # Auth store + LoginPage
│   ├── habits/              # Habit tracking
│   ├── labels/              # Label management
│   └── tasks/               # Todo/task management
├── layouts/                 # AppSidebar, DashboardLayout, AuthLayout, …
├── pages/                   # Route-level views
│   ├── DashboardView.vue
│   ├── TodayView.vue
│   ├── TodayPage.vue        # (legacy duplicate — see audit)
│   └── ActivityListView.vue
├── router/index.ts          # Layout-based routing
├── stores/todoStore.js      # Legacy store (migration pending)
└── styles/main.css          # Tailwind CSS entry
```

### Module Convention

Each feature module follows:

```
src/modules/<feature>/
├── components/    # Feature-scoped Vue components
├── store/         # Pinia store (*.store.ts)
├── types/         # TypeScript types (*.types.ts or index.ts)
└── pages/         # Feature pages (optional)
```

### Naming Conventions

| Kind | Convention | Example |
|---|---|---|
| Component | PascalCase `.vue` | `ActivityCard.vue` |
| Store | camelCase `.store.ts` | `activities.store.ts` |
| Types | camelCase `.types.ts` | `activity.types.ts` |
| Composable | `use` prefix `.ts` | `useAuth.ts` |
| Page | PascalCase `View.vue` | `DashboardView.vue` |
| Layout | PascalCase `Layout.vue` | `DashboardLayout.vue` |

---

## Routing

Layout-based routing defined in `src/router/index.ts`:

- **DashboardLayout** (`/`): dashboard, today, upcoming, activities, categories/:category, tags/:tag, completed, analytics, settings
- **AuthLayout** (`/login`): login

Navigation guard checks `useAuthStore().isAuthenticated`.

---

## How to Use Agents & Prompts

This repo includes Copilot **agents** (role-specific assistants) and **prompts** (task-specific workflows):

### Agents (`.github/agents/`)

| Agent | Role | Use When |
|---|---|---|
| `planner` | Writes specs & plans | Starting a new feature or change |
| `implementer` | Implements from a plan | You have a spec and need code |
| `reviewer` | Reviews code changes | Before merging a PR |
| `test-writer` | Writes tests only | Need test coverage |
| `release` | Prepares releases | Cutting a new version |

### Prompts (`.github/prompts/`)

| Prompt | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `plan-feature` | Generate a feature plan/spec |
| `implement-feature` | Implement a planned feature |
| `review-changes` | Review current diff for issues |
| `generate-tests` | Generate tests for a module/component |
| `prepare-release` | Generate release notes + verify readiness |

## Known Gaps

1. **No CI/CD pipeline** — builds and deploys are manual.
2. **No test runner** — jest/vitest not installed despite documentation references.
3. **No linter/formatter** — ESLint and Prettier not configured.
4. Page naming inconsistency (`TodayPage.vue` vs `TodayView.vue`).
5. Legacy `src/stores/todoStore.js` not yet migrated to module pattern.

See `docs/WORKFLOW_AUDIT_REPORT.md` for full details and recommended actions.
